get.summary:
Builds Google authorize URL (`access_type=offline`, `prompt=consent`).
Call with **Bearer JWT**; optional `userId` query must match the authenticated user.

Multi-client return URL:
- `platform=web` (default) — `GOOGLE_OAUTH_SUCCESS_REDIRECT`
- `platform=mobile` — `GOOGLE_OAUTH_MOBILE_SUCCESS_REDIRECT`
- `redirectTo=<url>` — explicit allowlisted return URL (stored in signed `state`)

OAuth redirect target (PUBLIC). Validates `state`, exchanges code, persists tokens,
then redirects client to URL embedded in signed `state` (web or mobile), falling back
to GOOGLE_OAUTH_SUCCESS_REDIRECT with `?googleCalendar=linked`.

post.summary: Path alias identical to POST `:roadMapId/queries` (helps clients that nest under `/pastor/`).

delete.summary: REST alias for `PATCH .../cancel` — cancels a scheduled appointment and removes Google Calendar events.

get.summary: Fetch a single appointment by Mongo id (must be declared before `GET :userId`).

REST shape `GET /appointments/:userId` — appointments where this user is mentee OR mentor/director mentor role.
Declared after static paths (`upcoming`, `user/`, `availability/`, etc.) so it only matches a single Mongo id segment.

patch.summary:
Mark a scheduled session as missed (no-show). Clears reusable join URLs like the cron job.
Idempotent when already missed. Response `data.status` is `missed`.

post.summary: Audit trail for opening the Zoom client. Host join also sets `status` to `in-progress` when still `scheduled`.

Mentoring journey: pastor asks the assigned mentor for a different time (queued until mentor picks a slot).
Same behavior as `POST /mentoring-sessions/:id/reschedule-request`.

get.summary:
One row per pastor: summary fields + full unified session on `nextSession` only
(no full 10-slot arrays on this endpoint).

`sessionId` = mentoring **appointment** Mongo `_id` (extras `data.appointmentId`).
Response matches the unified mentoring session object (same shape as pastor/mentor list rows).

post.summary:
Pastor asks the mentor to pick a new time (`sessionId` = appointment `_id`).
Allowed while the session is `scheduled`, `in-progress`, `postponed`, or `missed` (one pending request per appointment).

info.title: CCC Backend API
info.description: Christ Church Commission (CCC) Pastor Mentor platform REST API

defaultType.description:
Optional default type when clients only send files without specifying type.
If not present, we detect type from mimetype.

taskId.description: Alias for nestedRoadMapItemId (frontend may send either).

nestedRoadMapItemId.description: Scoped to a nested roadmap task; recommended for pastor/mentor task views.

googleCalendarTitle.description: Optional override for Google Calendar event title; falls back to `title` or default.

googleCalendarDescription.description: Optional override for Google Calendar event description; falls back to `description` / `notes`.

googleCalendarNonMentorUserId.description:
If the appointment `userId` is not the person whose Google Calendar should get the second event
(non-mentor party), pass that user's Mongo id here — e.g. Director mentoring session while `userId`
holds another linked record.

googleCalendarTitle.description: Optional override for Google Calendar event title; falls back to `title` or default.

googleCalendarDescription.description: Optional override for Google Calendar event description; falls back to `description` / `notes`.

googleCalendarNonMentorUserId.description:
If the appointment `userId` is not the person whose Google Calendar should get the second event
(non-mentor party), pass that user's Mongo id here — e.g. Director mentoring session while `userId`
holds another linked record.

clearPersonalizations.description: When true, clears exception/suppression lists before materializing so all days follow the new template only.

pastorId.description: Must match the appointment’s `userId` when unauthenticated callers pass it explicitly.

preSurvey.description: Replaces the full pre-survey question list. Send `[]` to clear when pre-survey is disabled.
Full replacement list; send `[]` to clear pre-survey questions.
